title: FCC Family Care Centre Johor Bahru
address: 17, Jalan Resam, Taman Bukit Tiram, 81800 Ulu Tiram, Johor Darul Ta'zim, Malaysia

peopleAlsoSearch.title: Yong An Old Folks Care Centre - Ulu Tiram, JB

reviews.text: I'd say the staff are pretty friendly, and the environment is pretty clean ^-^
这里的环境很好，空间也很大，整体感觉很干净、舒适。空气流通，环境让人觉得放松，也很适合居住。工作人员也很用心，很热情，让人感觉很安心。
reviews.textTranslated: The environment here is great, the space is spacious, and it feels clean and comfortable overall. The air circulation is excellent, the environment is relaxing, and it's a great place to live. The staff are also very attentive and welcoming, making me feel very safe and secure.

reviews.text:
老人院周围环境让人感到平静，员工也很专业，有耐心!
The nature surrounding the old folks' home makes people very relaxed, and the workers there are so professional and patient!
reviews.textTranslated: The environment around the nursing home is peaceful, and the staff are professional and patient!

reviews.text: 这里的环境非常棒，被大自然环绕，对老人的身心健康很有帮助，是一个能让老人安心养老的好地方。
reviews.textTranslated: The environment here is fantastic, surrounded by nature, which is very beneficial to the physical and mental health of the elderly. It is a great place for the elderly to live out their retirement in peace.

reviews.text: 这里环境很好 干净卫生 也很和谐 而且工作人员都很亲切
reviews.textTranslated: The environment here is great, clean and hygienic, and very harmonious. The staff are also very friendly.

reviews.text: 空气很好，工作人员们很有耐心！环境很漂亮👍
reviews.textTranslated: The air is great, and the staff are very patient! The environment is beautiful 👍

reviews.text: The staffs are patience and kind, the place is quite nice and big, cleaning there is also great.
The restrooms were clean, and the staff were kind.
这家养老院环境很好，卫生也很好。然后空间很大，为老年人提供很舒适的环境。工作人员态度很好，耐心细心地照顾每一位老人。总的来说，这是一间管理很好、服务周到的养老院。
reviews.textTranslated: This nursing home has a very nice environment and is very clean. The space is also very large, providing a comfortable environment for the elderly. The staff are very friendly and patiently and attentively care for each resident. Overall, it is a well-managed and well-serviced nursing home.

reviews.text: 环境很好地方很大人很好老人被照顾到很好 staff很好
reviews.textTranslated: The environment is great, the place is spacious, the people are very nice, the elderly are well taken care of, and the staff are excellent.

reviews.text: FCC Family Care Centre is incredible. This place is a wonderful place for us to visit, bcz at first when I reach there i thought it would be no different than other old folks home. But this one, it looks like a mansion. There's  fish pond, a big garden, a rlly large place for us to play and a building that looks like Mid Valley. After all, I felt very happy and cool bcz the service there is rlly awesome, all the caretaker is rlly polite and the one that I like the most is....... To talk with the old people there, help them clean the bathroom, clean the window and many more. If u guys want to pay a visit to old folks home, I recommend u guys to come and visit this one! This is the best day and best thing I ever done in my life. I hope u guys can give more support to this Old Folks Home.... ☺️☺️☺️

The place is extremely clean and well-maintained throughout, and it’s also quite spacious with plenty of room for residents to move around, rest or socialize. All the stuff are lovely people, super approachable and easy to communicate with. Whenever I have questions , they always respond promptly and patiently, and they treat us with kindness and care. It’s such a comfortable and reassuring environment overall.
工作人员都很好，把老人都照顾到很健康，环境也很干净
reviews.textTranslated: The staff were all very nice and took good care of the elderly, keeping them in good health. The environment was also very clean.

reviews.text: 工作人员都很友善，把老人照顾的很好，饮食方面也不错👍👍👍👍👍👍
reviews.textTranslated: The staff were very friendly and took good care of the elderly. The food was also good. 👍👍👍👍👍👍

reviews.text: 环境很好，照护人员态度很好
reviews.textTranslated: The environment is great, and the caregivers are very kind.

reviews.text: Large and nice outdoor area. Spoke with Bava, who provided a very clear explanation of the services.
Yesterday, I visited FCC, where my friend's mother stays. The place is clean, and the food is nutritious and balanced.

Speaking to Bava n Hani was very comforting. They focussed on the care n service that FCC could offer. Meeting with Hani in person was also very lively. She left me with the impression that she was passionate about her job n the patients under her care. Thanks ladies. Best regards, Wendy
Good to have retirement center close to nature environment

I made enquiries about FCC and Bava from Customer Service answered all my questions in detail. She was very helpful and explained the facilities provided by the centre clearly. I appreciate her patience and responses, thank you Bava.
Great relaxing environment , Attentive staff with quick and clear response to queries .
Pusat jagaan org tua

Large nice area for the old folks to walk around. We were promptly alerted during any emergencies. They have doctors and nurses who will come and check on the residents regularly. I find that very helpful. Special thanks to Ms. Bava for being so understanding, helpful, patient and kind. 🙏🏻

Very bad communication with staff here. Knowledge and care of elderly n sick very questionable. Very hard to get cooperation from staff. I would not recommend this place to anyone looking for a nursing home for their loved ones.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your feedback. FCC and our team will always strive to provide the best care and service to our residents. Please do reach to us directly on your areas of concerns if you are authorize person of the resident and we will address it timely. Thank you.

reviews.text: Very polite and kind response by the staff. Appreciate that.
Very good and friendly staff, giving very clear explaination for the services they provided and know their job well.

I had a great experience at FCC Family Care Centre, thanks to the exceptional customer service provided by Bava. She was very engaging and took the time to provide all the necessary details with clarity and care. Her dedication made my visit enjoyable and informative. I will definitely refer others to this centre.
Visited the center last week. Felt good about the center; the surroundings are quiet, peaceful, and the staff are friendly and professional. Will consider this center when the need arise.
Did a phone enquiry and Ms Ang and Bhava were very helpful in explaining the facility etc. will pay fcc a visit soon!

Looks good only on website, service is lousy. Dont bother to come this nursing home at all. Is far and the staff is lousy. We drove all the way to this place only to be told that you can only roam around the outside compound, they do not let you enter the premises
To view the room. How do you decide then if you can’t even see the conditions inside. Poor management poor service non attentive.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Sorry to hear that you did not have a good experience at FCC. Please do let us know if you have a family member staying with us and provide us more information so we can look into the matter more clearly. Thank you.

reviews.text: This place can help me calm my mind because this area surrounded by nature environment, farm, which is will be a good choice for us to stay here and visit💚 also staffs here are very friendly and able to provide great services✨
Care takers really takes a good care of patients.
The best ever ✨✨✨✨✨
" interesting place and explained well by Fatin "

Hi all,

I’m impressed with the service they’ve provided us. The environment is very clean and tidy. They also have Gardening area which is giving the home feel and help elderly people with mentally and physically. The nurses and other staff have been very supportive and helpful.

Highly recommended for those in needed.✨

Regards, Suganthaa Suppiah
Went to Pelangi Indah Karnival kesihatan Taman Pelangi Indah. Staff Nila explained well about the place.
reviews.textTranslated: Went to Pelangi Indah Taman Pelangi Indah Health Carnival. Staff Nila explained well about the place.

reviews.text: provide nice service for your loved ones when you're busy with works. help your family to spend their time doing interesting activities and recover
